title: Dummy Post: Data Leakage Checklist Before You Train
excerpt: A validation-oriented dummy write-up for testing list-heavy content and relatedness around model evaluation topics.

value: Check whether target-derived columns leak into features.
Verify time-based splits when timestamps exist.
Confirm feature engineering is fit only on training data.

content.value: If a metric feels suspiciously strong, leakage is often a better first hypothesis than breakthrough.
